workflows.name: Sales Digest
workflows.description: Generates a personalized daily sales digest for each enrolled user. At 6 AM on weekdays, the workflow retrieves the list of digest subscribers from the User Config Store, queries People.ai via MCP for each user's relevant account and opportunity activity, then passes the data to the LLM to compose a concise, actionable summary. The finished digest is delivered via Messaging (Slack, Teams, or Email) to each user.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Account activity and engagement data
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — LLM for digest generation
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers digests to subscribers
User Configuration Store (built-in JSON, Supabase, Airtable, or any database) — Subscriber list storage

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires at 6:00 AM on weekdays.

node_flow.name: Fetch Digest Users
node_flow.description: Reads the subscriber list from the Config Store and splits into individual batches.

node_flow.name: Gather Account Activity
node_flow.description: For each user, calls People.ai MCP to pull overnight account updates, engagement signals, and deal movements.

node_flow.name: AI Summarization
node_flow.description: AI Agent (via LLM + `agent`) synthesizes raw data into a personalized narrative with key takeaways and recommended actions.

node_flow.name: Deliver via Messaging
node_flow.description: Sends the formatted digest via Slack, Teams, or Email to the user.

workflows.name: Meeting Brief
workflows.description: Prepares an AI-generated briefing document before each upcoming meeting. A parent cron workflow fires every 15 minutes and invokes this sub-workflow for meetings approaching on the calendar. The workflow fetches account context from People.ai via MCP — recent activity, engagement history, key contacts — and passes it to the LLM to produce a concise meeting brief. The brief is delivered to the meeting owner via Messaging (Slack, Teams, or Email) so they walk in fully prepared.
workflows.trigger: Sub-workflow (called by Meeting Prep Cron, every 15 min) |
credentials: People.ai MCP — Account activity and engagement context
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — LLM for brief generation
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers briefs via Slack, Teams, or Email
User Configuration Store (built-in JSON, Supabase, Airtable, or any database) — Meeting and user metadata

node_flow.name: Sub-workflow Trigger
node_flow.description: Receives meeting details from the parent Meeting Prep Cron workflow.

node_flow.name: Enrich with Account Context
node_flow.description: Calls People.ai MCP to pull recent account activity, engagement timeline, and stakeholder map for the meeting's associated account.

node_flow.name: AI Brief Generation
node_flow.description: AI Agent analyzes the account context and composes a structured briefing with key talking points, recent interactions, and risk/opportunity signals.

node_flow.name: Deliver via Messaging
node_flow.description: Sends the formatted meeting brief via Slack, Teams, or Email to the meeting owner ahead of the call.

workflows.name: Silence & Contract Monitor
workflows.description: Monitors accounts for engagement gaps that may signal churn risk. Every morning at 6:30 AM, the workflow pulls accounts and checks for those that have "gone silent" — no meaningful engagement activity within a configured lookback window. For flagged accounts, it uses the LLM to assess the severity of the silence, considering deal stage, contract dates, and historical patterns. Accounts deemed concerning are surfaced via Alert (Slack, Teams, or Email) so the owning rep or CSM can re-engage.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Engagement activity and account data
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — LLM for risk assessment
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Alert delivery
User Configuration Store (built-in JSON, Supabase, Airtable, or any database) — Account metadata and configuration

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires daily at 6:30 AM.

node_flow.name: Identify Silent Accounts
node_flow.description: Queries People.ai MCP and the Config Store to find accounts with no recent engagement activity, then splits results into batches for processing.

node_flow.name: AI Risk Assessment
node_flow.description: For each silent account, the AI Agent evaluates the engagement gap against deal context, contract timelines, and historical norms to determine risk level.

node_flow.name: Filter & Route
node_flow.description: Conditional logic (`if` node) separates high-concern accounts from benign silences (e.g., post-close quiet periods).

node_flow.name: Alert via Messaging
node_flow.description: Sends targeted Alert (Slack, Teams, or Email) for accounts that warrant attention, including AI-generated context and suggested next steps.

workflows.name: Opportunity Discovery
workflows.description: Surfaces hidden revenue opportunities by identifying accounts with recent engagement activity but no corresponding open opportunities in the pipeline. On a weekly cadence, the workflow cross-references People.ai activity data against the CRM pipeline, flags accounts showing buying signals without active deals, and uses the LLM to analyze the strength of those signals. Findings are posted via Messaging (Slack, Teams, or Email) and optionally emailed, giving reps a curated list of accounts worth pursuing.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Account engagement and activity signals
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — LLM for opportunity scoring
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Posts discovery results to channel
SMTP — Email delivery for stakeholder summaries

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires on a weekly cadence.

node_flow.name: Gather Activity & Pipeline Data
node_flow.description: Pulls recent account engagement from People.ai MCP and current open opportunities, then merges the datasets to identify gaps.

node_flow.name: Identify Unmatched Accounts
node_flow.description: Code and set nodes cross-reference activity against pipeline to find accounts with engagement signals but no open opportunity.

node_flow.name: AI Signal Analysis
node_flow.description: AI Agent evaluates each flagged account's activity patterns, contact seniority, and engagement intensity to score opportunity likelihood and recommend next steps.

node_flow.name: Notify via Messaging
node_flow.description: Posts a prioritized list of discovered opportunities via Messaging (Slack, Teams, or Email) and sends email summaries to relevant stakeholders via SMTP.

workflows.name: Forecast Coach
workflows.description: Provides AI-powered coaching insights for sales leaders by analyzing their team's open pipeline each week. Every Monday, the workflow pulls each leader's team pipeline from People.ai, filters for active deals, and uses the LLM to assess deal health — looking at engagement recency, stakeholder coverage, stage velocity, and risk indicators. The result is a per-leader coaching report delivered via email, highlighting deals that need attention and suggesting specific coaching actions.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Pipeline data and engagement metrics
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — LLM for deal health analysis
SMTP — Email delivery for coaching reports

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires every Monday morning.

node_flow.name: Pull Team Pipeline
node_flow.description: Fetches open opportunities for each sales leader's team via People.ai MCP and filters for active, in-progress deals.

node_flow.name: AI Deal Health Analysis
node_flow.description: AI Agent evaluates each deal across multiple dimensions (engagement, momentum, stakeholder mapping, competitive signals) and generates coaching-ready insights.

node_flow.name: Compile Leader Reports
node_flow.description: Aggregates deal-level insights into a per-leader coaching summary with prioritized action items.

node_flow.name: Deliver via Email
node_flow.description: Sends each sales leader their personalized coaching report via SMTP.

workflows.name: Executive Inbox
workflows.description: Automates executive email triage by reading unread email messages, identifying those from customers or prospects, enriching them with CRM context from People.ai, and using AI to classify and route each message. The AI Agent analyzes the email content alongside account history to determine urgency, category (support escalation, deal progression, renewal, executive outreach, etc.), and the appropriate internal channel or person. Routed messages land in the right Messaging channel (Slack, Teams, or Email) or trigger follow-up workflows, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Account context and engagement history
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — LLM for triage and classification
Email (Gmail, Outlook, IMAP) — Executive inbox access
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Routes messages to appropriate channels
Project Management (Jira, Asana, etc.) — optional — Ticket and project context

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger & Email Fetch
node_flow.description: On a recurring schedule, reads unread emails from the executive's inbox (Gmail, Outlook, or IMAP).

node_flow.name: Identify Customer Emails
node_flow.description: Code and conditional logic filter out internal, automated, and non-customer messages, keeping only emails that warrant attention.

node_flow.name: Enrich with Account Context
node_flow.description: For each customer email, queries People.ai MCP and Project Management (Jira, Asana, etc.) to pull account status, recent activity, open tickets, and relationship history.

node_flow.name: AI Triage & Classification
node_flow.description: AI Agent (via agent, structured output parser, and chain) analyzes email content plus account context to assign urgency, category, and routing recommendation.

node_flow.name: Route to Channels
node_flow.description: A switch node directs each classified email to the appropriate Messaging channel (Slack, Teams, or Email), team member, or follow-up queue based on the AI's triage decision.

node_flow.name: Await & Follow Up
node_flow.description: Wait nodes handle deferred actions and ensure follow-up tasks are tracked.

workflows.name: Churn Risk Scorecard
workflows.description: Generates a weekly churn risk scorecard for the customer success team. The workflow pulls engagement trends, support ticket volumes, champion contact activity, and product usage signals from People.ai and the CRM. An AI agent scores each account on a 1-10 churn risk scale, identifies the top risk drivers, and suggests specific save plays. The scorecard is delivered to CS managers via Messaging with accounts ranked by risk severity.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Engagement trends and contact activity
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI risk scoring and analysis
CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) — Active account list and support data
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers scorecard to CS managers

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires weekly on Monday at 7:00 AM.

node_flow.name: Fetch Active Accounts
node_flow.description: Queries CRM for all active customer accounts assigned to the CS team.

node_flow.name: Enrich with Engagement Data
node_flow.description: For each account, pulls People.ai engagement trends, contact activity changes, and meeting frequency from MCP.

node_flow.name: AI Risk Scoring
node_flow.description: AI Agent analyzes engagement drop-offs, support ticket spikes, champion departures, and usage patterns to assign a 1-10 churn risk score with top risk drivers.

node_flow.name: Compile Scorecard
node_flow.description: Aggregates scored accounts into a ranked scorecard with risk tiers (Critical / Watch / Healthy) and suggested save plays.

node_flow.name: Deliver to CS Managers
node_flow.description: Sends the formatted scorecard via Messaging to each CS manager for their portfolio.

workflows.name: Renewal Prep Brief
workflows.description: Automatically generates renewal preparation briefs at 60, 30, and 15 days before each account's renewal date. The workflow queries the CRM for upcoming renewals, enriches each account with People.ai engagement trends, support history, expansion signals, and key contact activity. An AI agent produces a structured brief covering account health, risk factors, expansion opportunities, and a recommended renewal strategy. Briefs are delivered to the assigned CSM and account executive via Messaging.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Engagement trends and relationship health
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI brief generation
CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) — Renewal dates and account data
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers briefs to account teams

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires daily at 7:00 AM.

node_flow.name: Find Upcoming Renewals
node_flow.description: Queries CRM for accounts with renewals in 60, 30, or 15 days, filtering out those already briefed at this milestone.

node_flow.name: Enrich with Account Health
node_flow.description: For each renewal account, pulls People.ai engagement trends, support ticket history, champion activity, and expansion signals from MCP.

node_flow.name: AI Brief Generation
node_flow.description: AI Agent synthesizes engagement data into a structured renewal brief with health score, risk factors, expansion opportunities, and recommended strategy.

node_flow.name: Deliver to Account Team
node_flow.description: Sends the brief to the assigned CSM and AE via Messaging with the renewal date and urgency tier highlighted.

workflows.name: Onboarding Pulse
workflows.description: Monitors newly closed deals during their first 90 days to detect accounts going dark before they become a retention problem. The workflow identifies recently closed-won accounts, checks People.ai engagement data for post-sale activity (meetings booked, emails exchanged, contacts engaged), and flags accounts with below-threshold engagement. An AI agent assesses each flagged account and recommends specific re-engagement actions. Alerts are sent to the CSM and sales handoff team via Messaging.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Post-sale engagement tracking
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI engagement assessment
CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) — Closed-won account data
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Alerts to CSMs

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires daily at 8:00 AM.

node_flow.name: Find New Customers
node_flow.description: Queries CRM for accounts closed-won in the last 90 days.

node_flow.name: Check Post-Sale Engagement
node_flow.description: For each account, pulls People.ai data on meetings, emails, and contact engagement since close date.

node_flow.name: AI Engagement Assessment
node_flow.description: AI Agent evaluates whether engagement is on track, at risk, or dark. Generates re-engagement recommendations for at-risk accounts.

node_flow.name: Alert on Silent Accounts
node_flow.description: Sends alerts to the CSM for accounts flagged as at-risk or dark, with specific recommended next steps.

workflows.name: Activity Gap Detector
workflows.description: Compares each rep's weekly activity patterns against team benchmarks and top performer profiles using People.ai activity data. Identifies reps with low outbound activity, thin multi-threading on key deals, or single-threaded opportunities missing executive engagement. An AI agent generates personalized coaching nudges for sales managers, highlighting specific gaps and suggesting actionable improvement areas. Delivered weekly to frontline managers via Messaging.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Rep activity and engagement data
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI coaching analysis
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers coaching digests to managers

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires weekly on Friday at 8:00 AM.

node_flow.name: Fetch Team Activity
node_flow.description: Pulls People.ai activity data for all reps on the team: emails sent, meetings held, contacts engaged, accounts touched.

node_flow.name: Benchmark Analysis
node_flow.description: Code node calculates team averages and top-performer baselines, then flags reps falling below thresholds.

node_flow.name: AI Coaching Insights
node_flow.description: AI Agent analyzes each flagged rep's patterns, identifies specific gaps (e.g., low multi-threading, no exec outreach), and generates coaching recommendations.

node_flow.name: Deliver to Managers
node_flow.description: Sends a per-manager coaching digest via Messaging, listing their reps' gaps with suggested conversation starters.

workflows.name: Deal Hygiene Audit
workflows.description: Performs a weekly pipeline hygiene audit by scanning all open opportunities in the CRM and cross-referencing with People.ai engagement data. Flags deals with stale close dates, no recent activity, missing next steps, single-threaded contacts, or no executive engagement. An AI agent prioritizes the issues and generates a per-rep action list with specific cleanup tasks. Delivered to reps and their managers via Messaging every Monday morning.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Deal engagement and activity data
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI hygiene assessment
CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) — Open pipeline data
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers action lists to reps and managers

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires weekly on Monday at 7:30 AM.

node_flow.name: Pull Open Pipeline
node_flow.description: Queries CRM for all open opportunities with their stages, close dates, and assigned reps.

node_flow.name: Check Deal Engagement
node_flow.description: For each deal, pulls People.ai data on last activity date, contacts engaged, meeting recency, and email thread status.

node_flow.name: AI Hygiene Assessment
node_flow.description: AI Agent identifies hygiene issues per deal (stale, single-threaded, no exec, past close date) and prioritizes by deal value and stage.

node_flow.name: Deliver Action Lists
node_flow.description: Sends a per-rep cleanup checklist via Messaging, CC'ing their manager, with specific actions for each flagged deal.

workflows.name: Win/Loss Debrief Generator
workflows.description: Automatically generates a structured win/loss debrief when any deal closes (won or lost). Triggered by a CRM webhook on stage change, the workflow pulls the full engagement timeline from People.ai — every meeting, email, contact involved, and engagement cadence throughout the deal cycle. An AI agent analyzes the timeline to produce a structured debrief: what worked, where engagement dropped, key turning points, multi-threading effectiveness, and lessons learned. The debrief is delivered to the rep, their manager, and optionally a shared enablement channel.
workflows.trigger: Webhook — CRM deal stage change to Closed Won/Lost   |
credentials: People.ai MCP — Full deal engagement timeline
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI debrief generation
CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) — Deal close webhook and opportunity data
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers debriefs to rep, manager, and team

node_flow.name: Webhook Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires when a CRM opportunity moves to Closed Won or Closed Lost.

node_flow.name: Fetch Deal Timeline
node_flow.description: Pulls the complete People.ai engagement history for the deal: meetings, emails, contacts, activity cadence over the deal lifecycle.

node_flow.name: AI Debrief Analysis
node_flow.description: AI Agent analyzes the full timeline, identifies key moments (first exec meeting, proposal sent, competitor mention, engagement gaps), and generates a structured debrief.

node_flow.name: Deliver Debrief
node_flow.description: Formats the debrief as a rich message and delivers to the rep, their manager, and the team enablement channel via Messaging.

workflows.name: Competitive Displacement Alert
workflows.description: Monitors customer accounts for early signs of competitive displacement. The workflow scans People.ai engagement data for accounts where internal engagement has suddenly dropped while simultaneously checking for competitor mentions in email subjects, meeting titles, or CRM notes. An AI agent evaluates the combined signals to assess displacement risk and recommends defensive actions. High-risk alerts are sent immediately to the account owner and their manager via Messaging.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Engagement trend data and drop detection
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI displacement analysis
CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) — Competitor signal search
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — High-priority alerts to account teams

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires daily at 7:00 AM.

node_flow.name: Scan Engagement Drops
node_flow.description: Queries People.ai for accounts with significant week-over-week engagement declines (meetings, emails, response times).

node_flow.name: Check Competitor Signals
node_flow.description: For flagged accounts, searches CRM notes, email subjects, and meeting titles for competitor name mentions or evaluation-related keywords.

node_flow.name: AI Displacement Assessment
node_flow.description: AI Agent correlates engagement drops with competitor signals, assigns a displacement risk level, and generates a defensive action plan.

node_flow.name: Alert Account Team
node_flow.description: Sends high-priority alerts to the account owner and manager via Messaging with risk assessment and recommended defensive plays.

workflows.name: Territory Heat Map
workflows.description: Generates a weekly territory heat map digest for each rep, showing which accounts in their territory are heating up (increased inbound, new contacts engaging, meeting frequency rising) versus cooling down (declining engagement, unresponsive contacts). The workflow pulls People.ai engagement data across all accounts in each rep's territory, calculates week-over-week momentum scores, and uses an AI agent to summarize trends and recommend where to focus time. Delivered every Monday to help reps prioritize their week.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Account engagement data across territories
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI territory analysis
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers heat map digests to reps

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires weekly on Monday at 6:30 AM.

node_flow.name: Fetch Territory Assignments
node_flow.description: Pulls each rep's assigned accounts from CRM or People.ai territory data.

node_flow.name: Calculate Account Momentum
node_flow.description: For each account, queries People.ai for week-over-week engagement changes and calculates a momentum score (heating up / steady / cooling down).

node_flow.name: AI Territory Summary
node_flow.description: AI Agent analyzes the momentum map, identifies the hottest opportunities and coldest risks, and recommends a prioritized focus list for the week.

node_flow.name: Deliver Heat Map Digest
node_flow.description: Sends a per-rep territory digest via Messaging with accounts color-coded by momentum.

workflows.name: QBR Auto-Prep
workflows.description: Automatically prepares quarterly business review materials for every account on an upcoming QBR agenda. The workflow scans the calendar for meetings tagged as QBRs (or matching configurable title patterns), then for each account on the agenda, pulls the full quarter's engagement data from People.ai: meeting frequency, email volume, contacts engaged, key relationship changes, and deal progression. An AI agent generates a structured QBR prep document with executive summary, engagement trends, wins/risks, and talking points. Delivered to the account team 48 hours before the QBR.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Quarterly engagement data and relationship maps
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI document generation
CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) — Account and opportunity context
Calendar (Google Calendar, Outlook) — QBR meeting detection
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers prep materials to account teams

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires on a configurable schedule to check for upcoming QBRs within the next 48 hours.

node_flow.name: Find Upcoming QBRs
node_flow.description: Scans calendar for meetings matching QBR title patterns, extracts the associated account names.

node_flow.name: Pull Quarterly Engagement
node_flow.description: For each QBR account, queries People.ai for the full quarter's engagement data: meetings, emails, contact maps, and activity trends.

node_flow.name: AI QBR Document Generation
node_flow.description: AI Agent produces a structured QBR prep document with executive summary, quarter-over-quarter trends, key wins, risk areas, and recommended talking points.

node_flow.name: Deliver Prep Materials
node_flow.description: Sends the QBR prep document to the account team via Messaging 48 hours before the meeting.

workflows.name: Executive Sponsor Tracker
workflows.description: Monitors executive-level contact engagement across strategic deals to ensure champion and sponsor relationships stay active. The workflow identifies open opportunities above a configurable deal value threshold, checks People.ai for executive contact engagement (VP+ titles), and flags deals where executive sponsors have gone silent (no meetings or emails in the configured lookback window). An AI agent assesses the risk of each silent-sponsor situation and recommends re-engagement tactics. Alerts are sent to the deal owner and sales leadership via Messaging.
credentials: People.ai MCP — Executive contact engagement data
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI risk and re-engagement analysis
CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) — Strategic deal and contact data
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Alerts to deal owners and leadership

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires daily at 7:30 AM.

node_flow.name: Find Strategic Deals
node_flow.description: Queries CRM for open opportunities above the deal value threshold with identified executive contacts.

node_flow.name: Check Executive Engagement
node_flow.description: For each deal, pulls People.ai engagement data for VP+ contacts to detect silent sponsors (no activity in lookback window).

node_flow.name: AI Risk & Re-engagement
node_flow.description: AI Agent evaluates the impact of sponsor silence on deal health and generates specific re-engagement tactics per deal.

node_flow.name: Alert Deal Owners
node_flow.description: Sends alerts to deal owners and sales leadership via Messaging for deals with silent executive sponsors.

workflows.name: Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer
workflows.description: Enriches marketing-qualified leads at the moment of handoff by checking People.ai for existing engagement history. When a new MQL is created in the CRM or marketing automation platform, the workflow queries People.ai to see if the account already has relationship history — prior meetings, email threads, known contacts, or past opportunities. An AI agent scores the handoff quality (hot / warm / cold) and generates a context brief for the receiving SDR or AE, so they never walk into a "cold" call that's actually warm. Delivered instantly via Messaging.
workflows.trigger: Webhook — New MQL created in CRM/MAP                 |
credentials: People.ai MCP — Account engagement history
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI handoff scoring
CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.) — MQL data and account lookup
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers scored handoff to SDR/AE

node_flow.name: Webhook Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires when a new MQL is created in CRM or marketing automation platform.

node_flow.name: Enrich with People.ai History
node_flow.description: Queries People.ai for any existing engagement with the MQL's account: past meetings, email history, known contacts, prior opportunities.

node_flow.name: AI Handoff Scoring
node_flow.description: AI Agent evaluates the engagement history to score the handoff (hot / warm / cold) and generates a context brief with key talking points and relationship history.

node_flow.name: Deliver to SDR/AE
node_flow.description: Sends the scored handoff with context brief to the assigned SDR or AE via Messaging, including recommended first outreach approach.

workflows.name: Channel Pulse
workflows.description: Sends quick, 60-second scannable updates to internal customer channels with relevant account information from the last 7 days. Designed to keep the extended team and executives abreast of what's happening in key accounts without requiring them to dig through CRM data or attend every meeting.
workflows.output: Messaging (Slack channel, Teams channel, or Email)
credentials: People.ai MCP — Account activity, engagement signals, and contact data for the last 7 days
LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) — AI summarization of account activity into scannable updates
Messaging (Slack, Teams, Email) — Delivers updates to internal customer channels

node_flow.name: Schedule Trigger
node_flow.description: Fires on a configurable interval to check for accounts due for an update.

node_flow.name: Identify Active Accounts
node_flow.description: Queries People.ai MCP to find accounts with recent activity in the last 7 days.

node_flow.name: Gather Account Context
node_flow.description: For each account, pulls engagement data, meeting notes, deal movements, and contact activity from People.ai.

node_flow.name: AI Summarization
node_flow.description: AI Agent synthesizes the raw activity data into a concise, scannable update formatted for quick consumption.

node_flow.name: Route to Channel
node_flow.description: Determines the correct internal customer channel for each account.

node_flow.name: Deliver Update
node_flow.description: Posts the formatted update to the appropriate Slack/Teams channel or sends via email.

configuration: Update interval: How frequently to check for and send account updates
Lookback window: Number of days of activity to include (default: 7)
Channel mapping: Map accounts to their internal Slack/Teams channels
Update format: Customize the summary template and level of detail
Account filter: Include/exclude accounts based on tier, owner, or segment

sample_output.content:
**Acme Corp — Weekly Pulse**

*3 meetings this week* — 2 with VP Engineering (Sarah Chen), 1 with CFO (Mike Torres). Deal advanced from Stage 3 to Stage 4 after technical validation completed. Champion initiated renewal conversation — positive signals.

No activity from economic buyer in 12 days — consider a check-in before QBR.

**Key Contacts**
- Sarah Chen (Champion) — Active, 3 touchpoints this week
- Mike Torres (Economic Buyer) — Quiet, last activity 12 days ago
- James Park (Technical Eval) — Active, completed POC review
